messages.content:
Hello! I’m the AI Technical Proposal Architect at Elvoria Tech. I’m here to help you translate your idea into a clear, AI‑first technical plan and outline the next steps.  

Could you tell me a bit about the product or service you’re envisioning? What problem are you trying to solve, and who will be using it? This will let me start shaping a solution that fits your goals.

additionalContext: Awaiting user to provide product idea details and problem statement.
